title: Proto Workstate feed (v1)
description: Proto-owned rolling summary of recent protocol runs, emitted by `proto run` (automatically) and `proto feed` (on demand) for Workstate ingestion. One well-known file (proto.json), overwritten each time, holding the most recent N sessions. Distinct from the per-run `proto.session` record (proto.session.schema.json), which is one detailed file per run; this feed is the integration artifact aimed at Workstate, modeled on the same envelope as bulwark.workstate-feed.v1.
$comment: Modeled from proto/src/core/feed.rs (WorkstateFeed, FeedItem). JSON Schema does not enforce item_count == items.length; Proto's producer contract test (feed_contract) covers that invariant. Per suite contract rules, optional fields (finished_at) are OMITTED when absent rather than written as null.

schema_version.description: Integer major version. Workstate gates on this FIRST. Bumped only on a breaking change.

source_tool.description: Producer attribution; always "proto" for this feed.

generated_at.description: When Proto generated this feed file, as an RFC3339 timestamp.

item_count.description: Number of items in the feed (equals items.length).

items.description: Recent sessions, newest first, capped at Proto's feed window.

id.description: Session id (the per-run session file's stem); the handle to the full record.

protocol_id.description: Stable id of the protocol that was run.

protocol_title.description: Human-facing title of the protocol, copied in so the row is self-describing.

finished_at.description: When every step had an outcome, RFC3339. OMITTED while the run is incomplete.

status.description: Completion state: complete once no step is pending, else incomplete.

summary.description: Proto's own compact "N passed, N failed, …" outcome line (zero categories omitted).
